title: clean and opt passes remove blackbox cells not connected indirectly to a top port

features.name: blackbox module with inout ports instantiated in top
features.description: Code should include a module marked with the blackbox attribute that has inout ports, instantiated in the top-level module

features.name: multiple instances of blackbox sharing inout wire not at top port
features.description: Code should include multiple instantiations of the same blackbox module where one inout port connects to a top-level port and another connects to an internal wire shared between instances

features.name: inout top port connected to blackbox cell
features.description: Code should include a top-level module with an inout port directly connected to an inout port of a blackbox cell instance
